meta.title: TNS AI Documentation Portal
meta.description: User guides and technical documentation for the TNS AI applications suite: EcoData, EcoLab, EcoLit, PDFHUB, and KEYWORDs.

hero.title: TNS AI Documentation
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive user guides and resources to help faculty, researchers, and graduate students exploit the AI-powered econometrics and research tools of TNS AI.

steps.title: EcoData
steps.description: Extract international macro statistics (World Bank, IMF, FRED) and micro-level survey databases (VHLSS, PCI).

steps.title: EcoLab
steps.description: Conduct quantitative analysis with over 30 econometric models integrated with AI RAG and Neo4j academic graphs.

steps.title: EcoLit
steps.description: Automate academic literature reviews mapping metadata across OpenAlex, Crossref, and ORCID registries.

steps.title: PDFHUB
steps.description: Parse and structure tabular data from financial report PDFs using LiteParse and Prompt Caching.

steps.title: KEYWORDs
steps.description: Analyze keyword frequencies in corporate annual reports using optimized local OCR engines.

sources.title: Documentation Directory
sources.description: Select an application below to view detailed operational guides, feature breakdowns, and deployment instructions.

items.title: EcoData User Guide
items.description: Learn how to log in, search indicators, preview datasets, and export structured variables for analysis.

items.title: EcoLab User Guide
items.description: Learn how to estimate regressions, use AI RAG agents, manage API keys, and complete SePay bank transfers.

items.title: EcoLit User Guide
items.description: Learn how to query papers via OpenAlex, extract Crossref metadata, and sync scholar profiles using ORCID.

items.title: PDFHUB User Guide
items.description: Learn how to upload files, configure schema-based table parsing, and reduce API costs via Prompt Caching.

items.title: KEYWORDs User Guide
items.description: Learn how to monitor corporate annual reports, calibrate OCR DPI, and export standalone Google Colab scripts.

tools.title: AI-Optimized Academic Research Workflow
tools.description: The TNS AI ecosystem links databases and academic metadata, enabling researchers to transition smoothly from project ideation to reproducible empirical outputs.

items.title: Integrated Econometrics
items.description: Generate reproducible code scripts in Stata, R, and Python for any econometric specification.

items.title: Knowledge Graph Mapping
items.description: Visualize connections between authors, papers, and economic topics using Neo4j.

items.title: Privacy & Local Deployment
items.description: Prioritize local CPU/GPU execution via Ollama and open-source models to protect proprietary research data.
